Looking at the evidence:

2. On February 4, 2011, Cambodia expressed intent to engage in diplomatic cooperation (policy support) with Thailand.
3. On April 25, 2011, Cambodia expressed intent to engage in diplomatic cooperation with Vietnam.

The earliest support-like action after 2010 appears to be with Thailand on January 5, 2011 (Engage_in_diplomatic_cooperation), followed by expressed intent for policy support on February 4, 2011.

The first occurrence of this relation after 2010 is Cambodia expressing intent to engage in diplomatic cooperation (policy support) with Thailand on February 4, 2011.

<answer>Thailand</answer>
